view.title: Validate explicit UC need #4
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for branching logic based on email interaction is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for branching logic based on email interaction is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for branching logic by referencing the condition step 'if_opened' in the marketing campaign. This step explicitly defines actions based on whether an email was opened, with 'onTrueStepKey' directing to 'send_offer' and 'onFalseStepKey' directing to 'send_reminder'. This directly aligns with the requirement of implementing branching logic based on email interaction, confirming that the requirement is covered.
